items.title: [正面] I honestly don't see people's problem with this ga...
items.summary: I honestly don't see people's problem with this game. The tactical roguelite aspect of this has been pretty enjoyable and it does lovecraftian horror pretty well. They also threw premium summon material/currency at us as if it was free to them. My only problem is the translations error, but that isn't a problem if you've looked at a thesaurus once in your life.

items.title: [负面] 原来是灵犀互娱，那没事了，林冲主打一个陪伴

items.title:
[正面] 好玩爱玩
福利多 推进一节送一抽
每节战斗关还有关卡成就
基本上每章节成就送五抽多（没特意去数...
items.summary:
好玩爱玩
福利多 推进一节送一抽
每节战斗关还有关卡成就
基本上每章节成就送五抽多（没特意去数，但应该是这个数）
还有星级奖励也是送几抽
永久活动还有通过一章给五抽
四个类型的角色和武器
双重定轨
配合上给的那么多抽数
基本上在打完第一张的时候就有能力拉起一队高启灵（命座/星魂/...)

items.title: [正面] Super fun so far, getting new Characters is RNG ba...
items.summary: Super fun so far, getting new Characters is RNG based but the game has provided plenty of opportunity to roll for them without swiping. I really love the soundtrack, has the perfect hit of melancholy.
